page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition 3nd Imp͡act ORIGINAL SOUNDTRACK
text:
is the soundtrack album of Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: 3nd Impact game. It features music composed by Shirō Sagisu and arranged by from GRASSHOPPER MANUFACTURE. The album was released enclosed with the game by NAMCO BANDAI Games Inc. with the catalog number NKCD-6567, it was released on 29 September 2011. https://vgmdb.net/album/26818 

The album was digitally published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number NOPA-142, it was released on 29 September 2011.

Tracklist

 https://vgmdb.net/album/29201 The tracklist is the digital version, not the physical version. 

References
